name: Cinnamon Won-Ton Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 10-inch microwave-proof plate with paper towel.
2. Cut wonton wrappers diagonally into triangles.
3. Place cut edges of each triangle together; arrange the 12 triangles on a plate with points toward the center.
4. Coat the triangles with nonstick cooking spray.
5. Sprinkle 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon-sugar mixture over the wontons.
6. Microwave, uncovered, on High for about 1-1/2 minutes or until crisp and browned.
7. Serve warm or cool.
8. Repeat with remaining wontons.
Makes 24 triangles. Per triangle: 12 calories, no fat, no cholesterol, 10 mg sodium.
